title: ROPE validation report
description: Output shape of running a validation-suite.schema.json document against a model. Deliberately a flat shape (not a second envelope/kind split) — kept simple since only three check kinds exist today.

value.description: A plain number for a single aggregate score, an object of named numbers for a check that produces several (e.g. per-altitude RMSE), or null for a plot-only check (e.g. lonlat_density_plot). threshold evaluation (in the check-kind schemas) is only defined for the plain-number case — a per-key threshold scheme is an explicit non-goal for now.

plots.description: Relative paths (relative to this report file's own directory, i.e. the model's exported_dir), conventionally under a plots/ subfolder, e.g. "plots/case_003_check_001_lonlat_400km.png". May be empty.

passed.description: Null when the check's kind/params defined no threshold.

suite_content_version.description: Copied from the content_version of the validation-suite document that was run. Compared against a manifest's validation.suite_content_version to detect staleness.
